name: Agile Ring
description: You feel more dexterous when using this ring.

name: Bastion Ring
description: A ring that contains a fragment of the bastion spirit.

name: Blaster Ring
description: This ring was invented by sorcerers and represents the peak of magi-tech engineering.

name: Boglord Ring
description: This ring hums with the strength of the Lord Frogg's servants and the fury of his throne.

name: Bumblz Honey Ring
description: Summons become stronger when using this ring.

name: Buni Ring
description: Fluffy!

name: Caster Ring
description: Magic becomes stronger when using this ring.

name: Concussive Ring
description: The ring reverberates with a slight rumble.

name: Drill-bit Ring
description: This ring has a small drill which can be used to break rocks, or make holes in your wall I guess...

name: Earthen Ring
description: A tough and sturdy ring that channels the power of the earth.

name: Escape Ring
description: This ring fills you with adrenaline as if your being chased by a strong guy with a sword

name: Eyering
description: An odd barely fitting ring. It seems to be alive and twitch before you get hit.

name: Fire Ring
description: Fire magic becomes stronger when using this ring.

name: Froggy Ring
description: A weird soft gross ring shaped like the head of a bulfrogg.

name: Fungal Ring
description: Poison becomes more potent when using this ring.

name: Gemstone Ring
description: Magic heals the user when using this ring.

name: Hex Ring
description: Hex magic becomes stronger when using this ring.

name: Holy Ring
description: Holy magic becomes stronger when using this ring.

name: Infectious Ring
description: When equipped this ring gives you a slight sniffle.

name: Lucky Ring
description: Super lucky!

name: Parrying Ring
description: This ring grants you a buckler shield allowing you to parry attacks.

name: Phalanx Ring
description: Finisher attacks are faster and cause a stab that has a chance to apply bleed.

name: Quickstep Ring
description: This ring makes your body feel like it's as light as air.

name: Raging Slayer Ring
description: This ring screams with the souls of 100's of dead titans.

name: Sharp Ring
description: This ring makes you feel stronger.

name: Sharpshooter Ring
description: This ring enhances your long range attacks!

name: Sticky Ring
description: Magic becomes stickier and stronger when using this ring.

name: Stone Giant's Ring
description: A cracked and dishevelled ring carved out of stone that was once living.

name: Sweet Ring
description: Sweet honey gathered by bumblz helps cultivate the health of the hive.

name: Void Contract Ring
description: Painful thorns bind this ring to the assassin until the contract is complete. Commonly used by void cultists outsourcing work

name: Void Ring
description: This ring vibrates with the energy of the void. Even holding it sends chills down your spine.

name: Warden Ring
description: This ring was made to protect those who you value the most.

name: Water Ring
description: Water magic becomes stronger when using this ring.

name: Whirl Inhale Ring
description: This ring allows creates a small vacuum when battling.

name: Wind Ring
description: Air magic becomes stronger when using this ring.
